_comment: Use this payload to trigger a test placement drive in the BPMN process. Pass these as process input variables when starting the instance in Maestro.
job_description: Infosys is recruiting campus talent for the role of Systems Engineer. Responsibilities include software development, testing, and maintenance of enterprise applications. Ideal candidates will demonstrate strong programming fundamentals, problem-solving skills, and a collaborative mindset. Experience with Java, Python, or JavaScript is preferred. Prior internship or project work in backend development, APIs, or data processing is a significant advantage.
_eligible_students_expected: With the above criteria, 11 of the 20 students in mock-erp/data/students.json should be eligible.
_screening_expected: Kavya (9.3 CGPA, Google intern), Sneha (Goldman Sachs intern), Priya (Microsoft intern) should rank highest. Karan (Flutter only) should rank lowest among eligible candidates.

_human_tasks.instructions: Log into Action Center as TPO. You should see 11 candidates ranked by AI score. Select 'Approve All' or pick 6-8 candidates. Submit.
Log in as Company HR. Set date=2024-03-15, time=10:00, mode=Online, link=https://meet.google.com/test-link, panel=Rajesh Kumar (Senior SDE)
After 'interviews', log in as HR. Mark 3-4 candidates as Selected with package_lpa=9.5 and role=Systems Engineer. Mark others Not Selected with feedback.
